arts.ttl: Graeme Shinnie sick of Celtic growing his Aberdeen collection nobody gets to see thanks to bogieman Brendan Rodgers
arts.sum: Shinnie has been on the losing end in three finals against Celtic and is desperate to buck his personal Hampden trend this Saturday

arts.ttl: Sir Alex Ferguson slips Aberdeen some Celtic shock tips as Jimmy Thelin reveals Scottish Cup Final advice
arts.sum: Fergie was used to lifted silverware with the Dons at the National Stadium an Thelinmight need all the help he can get

arts.ttl: Who will win Aberdeen vs Celtic? Our writers predict Scottish Cup Final clash at Hampden
arts.sum: Our writers predict the Hampden showdown and by all accounts it's set to be a grim afternoon at the National Stadium for the Dandies

arts.ttl: Do miracles come this big for Aberdeen against Celtic?
arts.sum: Should Aberdeen beat Celtic in Saturday's Scottish Cup final, it will will take its place in the dusty annals of Hampden giant kills, writes Tom English.

arts.ttl: What channel is Aberdeen vs Celtic? Free live stream, TV, ref, VAR and Scottish Cup Final team news
arts.sum: The glamour end-of-season showdown at Hampden is almost upon us as Celts stand on the brink of another Treble

arts.ttl: How can Aberdeen stop Celtic and win Scottish Cup?
arts.sum: Aberdeen's recent record against Celtic and their recent form overall does not suggest they will offer much of a threat to the holders. But can they defy the odds?
